raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tai Deend tee Kalni
no falda Wihna villehs/ un tee
Pakalni no Peena tezzehs/ un
wiſſi Strauti no Juhda buhs
pilni ar Uhdens/ un tur iſlehks
weens Awots no ta KUNGA
Namna/ tas flazztnahs wiſſu
Eeleiju Sittiun.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Egipte taps pohſta/ un
Eedoms par weenu tukſhu poh-
ſtu Weetu/ ta Warras-Darba
deht/ kas darrihts irr pee teem
Behrneem Juhda/ kuru Sem-
mê tee nenoseedsigu Affini irr
iſlehjuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Juhda paliks unh-
schigi/ un Jeruſaleme us Zilschu
Ziltim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es fchkihſtichu tohs/
(fo) es no winnu Affnim ne bi-
ju fchkikſtijs. Un tas KUNGS
dſihwohs eekſch Zianas.
Ta Praweeta Joela Gals.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta I. Nodalla.
Amos/ weens no teem Ganneem no Tekoas:
Sluddina prett Damafku : 3. Jeb Siri-
in : 5. Prett Gasu jeb Wiliftereem : 6/ 8.
Prett Zoru jeb Tiru : 9. Prett Eedomu :
II. Prett Ammonu : 13. Un Moabu : I.
Chee irr tee nus Landis) ar leeſu Aistwe-
Wahrdi Amota/ ſchanu aiswedduſchi/ nodoha-
tas ſtarp teem mi tohs Eedomam.
Lohpu-Ganneem
bija no Tekoas/
ko winſch irr re-
dſejs pahr Israelu/ Usijus ta
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Fehnina no Juhda Deendas/ un
Jerobeama ta Dehta Joafa/ ta
Fehnina no Israëta Deendas/ di-
wi Gaddus preekſch tahs Sem-
mee Trihzeſchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſch fazzija: Ta-
KUNGS ruhfs no Zianas/ un
pazels fawu Balkfut no Jerusa-
lemes/ ka to Gannu Pławn-
behdaſees/ un ta Karmeta Wir-
Gals nokaltibs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Treju jeb tschetro Pahrkahpscha-
nu deht no Damaskus/ es to ne-
nowehrſischu/ tapehz ka tee Gile-
adu ar uffeem Dſelses Sprigu-
teem irr kuhtluschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht fuhtifchu es ug-
guni Asaëta Namunā/ tas ap-
rihs BenAdada skaistus Nam-
nus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es falausischu to Ais-
ſchaujamu no Damaskus/ un is-
deldeſchu tohs Eedsihwotajus no
tahs Eeleijas Awen/ un to/ kas
to Szepteri turr/ no ta Preeka
Namna/ un tee Sthreru Landis
taps aiswesti uhs Kiru/ fakka
tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Trejo jeb tschetro Pahrkahpscha-
nu deht no Gazas/ es to ne no-
wehrſischu/ tadeht ka tee (man-
nus Landis) ar leeſu Aistwe-
ſchanu aiswedduſchi/ nodoha-
mi tohs Eedomam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht fuhtifchu es Uggu-
ni eekſch Gazas Muhri/ tas ap-
rihs winnas skaistus Namnus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es isdeldeſchu tohs Ee-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
